name: Shop: Loyalty Reminder

description.en: Check for customers who haven't visited recently and send them a reminder.
description.de: Prüfe auf Kunden, die kürzlich nicht da waren, und sende eine Erinnerung.

bot: Daily scheduled. SHOP_ID in query (get from setting-get when scheduling). STALE_SINCE = now - (reminder_days * 86400). For each stale customer card ID: GET /v1/contacts?propKey=card&propValue={cardId} to find the JoAi contact, get their phone, send WhatsApp reminder via POST /social/send, log activity.

inputs.name: STALE_SINCE
inputs.bot: Calculate as: current unix timestamp minus (REMINDER_DAYS * 86400)
